ksa_text: Skill in designing AI training data governance and quality assurance, including data provenance tracking, design choice documentation, representativeness evaluation, and data preparation security.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Security & Platform Strategy KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.0) to justify inclusion for the BI Director. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world BI Director roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Security & Platform Strategy is not a standard competency expectation for BI Director. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the BI Director competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.0) and edge-domain placement (Security & Platform Strategy) do not meet inclusion threshold for the BI Director. All passes support exclusion.
